data.school_name: University of Chicago Booth School of Business - Master in Finance
data.key_differentiators: The curriculum strategically prepares students to master transformative innovations disrupting the finance industry, including A.I., machine learning, blockchain technologies and applications, and big data. Students can choose from four areas of specialization: Asset Management, Investment Banking, Fintech or Research in Finance, and have the flexibility to complete the program in either 15 months (standard track) or 10 months (accelerated track).
